Class PagedGui

java.lang.Object
eu.pb4.sgui.api.gui.BaseSlotGui
eu.pb4.sgui.api.gui.SimpleGui
io.icker.factions.ui.PagedGui
All Implemented Interfaces:
eu.pb4.sgui.api.gui.GuiLike, eu.pb4.sgui.api.gui.SlotBasedGui, eu.pb4.sgui.api.SlotHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
ListGui, MemberGui
@Internal public abstract class PagedGui extends eu.pb4.sgui.api.gui.SimpleGui
